allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\l2gm\\data\\servers.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('count:',len\(d\)\); print\('max id:',max\(s['id'] for s in d\)\); import collections; print\('cardTypes:',collections.Counter\(s['cardType'] for s in d\)\); print\('dates:', sorted\(set\(s['startDate'] for s in d\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('C:/Users/Admin/Desktop/l2gm/data/servers.json'\); console.log\('count:',d.length\); console.log\('max id:',Math.max\(...d.map\(s=>s.id\)\)\); const c={}; d.forEach\(s=>c[s.cardType]=\(c[s.cardType]||0\)+1\); console.log\('cardTypes:',c\); console.log\('dates:',[...new Set\(d.map\(s=>s.startDate\)\)].sort\(\)\); console.log\('chronicles:',[...new Set\(d.map\(s=>s.chronicle\)\)].sort\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('C:/Users/Admin/Desktop/l2gm/data/servers.json'\); console.log\('count:',d.length\); const bad=d.filter\(s=>s.startDate<'2026-03-16'\); console.log\('below cutoff:',bad.length\); const dates=d.slice\(-9\).map\(s=>s.startDate\).sort\(\); console.log\('new range:',dates[0],'to',dates[dates.length-1]\); console.log\('last id:',d[d.length-1].id\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('C:/Users/Admin/Desktop/l2gm/data/servers.json'\); console.log\('count:',d.length\); console.log\('max id:',Math.max\(...d.map\(s=>s.id\)\)\); const c={}; d.forEach\(s=>c[s.cardType]=\(c[s.cardType]||0\)+1\); console.log\('cardTypes:',c\); console.log\('new ids 263+:', d.filter\(s=>s.id>=263\).map\(s=>\({id:s.id,name:s.name,chronicle:s.chronicle,rate:s.rate,date:s.startDate,url:s.url}\)\)\);")
